commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the patch is ready for maintainer review and merge if maintainers accept the path-prefix behavior.; Cleared: The diff only changes local URL construction and a focused test; it does not touch dependencies, CI, secrets, auth, or supply-chain surfaces. commands.review_summary:
The branch changes TwiML and `vox dial` URL construction to append `/twilio` and `/twiml` to an existing `VOX_PUBLIC_BASE_URL` path and adds a path-prefix regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main uses absolute-path URL construction, and `new URL("/twilio", new URL("https://example.com/vox"))` reproduces the prefix drop directly.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the patch is ready for maintainer review and merge if maintainers accept the path-prefix behavior.

target.title: fix(twiml): preserve base path prefix when building WebSocket and TwiML URLs
target.body:
## Summary

- `new URL("/twilio", base)` is an absolute-path reference per the URL spec — it **replaces** the entire path of the base URL. So `VOX_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://host/vox` would produce `wss://host/twilio` instead of `wss://host/vox/twilio`, silently breaking any path-prefixed reverse-proxy setup.
- Fix `wsUrlFromPublicBase` in `src/twiml.ts` to concatenate onto the base pathname directly.
- Fix the same bug in `src/cli.ts` where `vox dial` builds its TwiML URL fallback.

## Real behavior proof

Pure URL string transformation — fully deterministic, exercised without a network connection.

Before the fix:
```
wsUrlFromPublicBase(new URL("https://example.com/vox"), "/twilio")
→ "wss://example.com/twilio"  // prefix dropped
```

After the fix:
```
wsUrlFromPublicBase(new URL("https://example.com/vox"), "/twilio")
→ "wss://example.com/vox/twilio"  // preserved
```

```
# Subtest: wsUrlFromPublicBase preserves a base path prefix
ok 1 - wsUrlFromPublicBase preserves a base path prefix
```

Trailing-slash normalization also covered (`https://example.com/vox/` → `wss://example.com/vox/twilio`, no double slash).

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm run lint`
- [x] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [x] `pnpm test` — 57/57 passing, including:
  - `test/twiml.test.ts` — existing protocol-conversion test still passes; new path-prefix test catches the regression
- [x] `pnpm run build`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: joevenner
